source_point_summary: The hadith was separated from the sharh; explained and explanation were split.
routing_rationale: This is the core owner reaction and the main structural diagnosis.

source_point_summary: Separation of proof and proving is attractive in theory but problematic in practice.
routing_rationale: Preserves the owner’s attraction to separation-of-concerns without flattening his practical resistance.

source_point_summary: Hadith variants and ratings make explanation/explained splitting dangerous.
routing_rationale: This is one of the owner’s strongest practical reasons for resisting blind separation.

source_point_summary: I do not want to hunt for which hadith version a scholar was explaining.
routing_rationale: Routes the anti-hunting requirement into both owner answer and engineering diagnosis.

source_point_summary: Proofs as found in books should be preserved and not lost.
routing_rationale: This is an engineering-layer preservation requirement, not the app answer itself.

source_point_summary: Proofs also need authoritative fetching and confirmation before study.
routing_rationale: Routes the owner’s confirmed-proof requirement into the proof-integrity architecture layer.

source_point_summary: The note definitely helps for the current pair, but it is not extensive enough.
routing_rationale: Preserves both the forced A answer and the owner’s dissatisfaction with the note as a remedy.

source_point_summary: Better than a generated note would often be leaving in the context in a clearly separated block.
routing_rationale: This is a design-direction claim, not part of the forced owner A/B/C answer.

source_point_summary: Knowledge integrity prevails over mere context preservation; stay as close to source wording as possible.
routing_rationale: Routes the owner’s explicit priority ordering into constraints.

source_point_summary: Books may be loose in wording/source/chain and cannot be the only final authoritative proof layer.
routing_rationale: Preserves the owner’s distinction between preserved source and authoritative proof study.

source_point_summary: Scholars can interweave rulings and proof explanations in many methodologies.
routing_rationale: Feeds the methodology-variability and uncertainty-gate analysis.

source_point_summary: Never assume all edge cases are covered; unseen patterns require caution and intelligent gates.
routing_rationale: Captures the owner’s fear of the unseen as a durable safeguard requirement.

source_point_summary: The forced A/B/C note answer must not cap the deeper diagnosis.
routing_rationale: Prevents flattening the owner’s hierarchy into a shallow note-UX answer.
